description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pkgdown that runs on push to master, main, docs*, and cran-* branches, on pull requests to main and master, and on a scheduled cron job. Use an ubuntu-18.04 job to check GitHub rate limits, checkout code, set up R and Pandoc, install dependencies, cache R packages, configure Git identity, install system and pkgdown dependencies, install and build the package, and deploy it to a branch on push.
